parameters.query: SELECT s.id, s.coin, s.direction, s.entry_price, s.stop_loss, s.trailing_atr_mult, s.trail_activation_pct, s.position_size_usdt, s.risk_amount_usdt, s.created_at, s.expires_at FROM signals s WHERE s.id = $1 AND s.status = 'approved' AND s.expires_at > NOW()
SELECT available_capital, system_active FROM portfolio WHERE id = 1

WITH new_trade AS (
  INSERT INTO trades (signal_id, coin, direction, entry_price, entry_time, position_size_usdt, position_size_units, initial_stop, current_stop, trailing_atr_mult, trail_activation_pct, exchange_order_id, status)
  VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, NOW(), $5, $6, $7, $8, $9, $10, $11, 'open')
  RETURNING id
)
UPDATE signals SET status = 'executed', executed_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1;
UPDATE portfolio SET
  available_capital = available_capital - $5,
  locked_in_positions = locked_in_positions + $5,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = 1;

parameters.text:
={{ '✅ *Obchod otevřen!*

' + ($('Process Fill').first().json.direction === 'long' ? '🟢' : '🔴') + ' ' + $('Process Fill').first().json.coin + ' ' + $('Process Fill').first().json.direction.toUpperCase() + '
💰 Entry: `' + $('Process Fill').first().json.entry_price.toFixed(8) + '`
📊 Velikost: $' + $('Process Fill').first().json.position_size_usdt.toFixed(2) + '
🛑 Stop: `' + $('Process Fill').first().json.current_stop + '`' }}
